videos.title: The Most Expensive Off-Road Trailer I've Ever Towed
videos.description: I've had the Patriot Campers ST5 Super Tourer for a couple months now and it's time to talk about it. I've taken it solo, Regena and I did a four day trip up to Northern California, and we've really gotten to know this trailer. In this video, I take it out into the desert for one last trip before summer shuts things down, walk you through everything inside and out, and give you my honest take on what it's like to live with the most expensive off-road trailer I've ever towed. videos.title: Tundra Camping in Peaceful Appalachia
videos.description:
Ride along as the Griz steps up to lead our overland adventures following the growing list of mechanical challenges with Silver. In this episode, I head off on a (much needed) peaceful trail exploration through the scenic Appalachians.

I also give an update on the Tundra’s evolving overland kit, and share recent modifications designed for comfort and capability on these extended trips. While I truly miss travel in the Wild West, these eastern adventures offer a different pace and a distinct sen
